verdict.biggestRisk: Fixture content is illustrative and not grounded in a real project.
verdict.decisionRationale: The document is internally consistent and complete for a fixture. It intentionally carries no unsupported market numbers. It is suitable for exercising the downstream pipeline. Minor polish only.

attacks.title: Illustrative figures
attacks.whyItMatters: A real deliverable would need sourced numbers.
attacks.evidence: Cost Estimation section uses $0.00 for mock stages.
attacks.fix: In live mode, replace placeholders with sourced estimates.

revisionBrief.instruction: Clarify that all figures are illustrative fixtures.
